signals.headline: Iran-Israel/US Conflict Market Hits 100% on "Ends by Dec 31" | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran-Israel/US Conflict Market Hits 100% on "Ends by Dec 31" | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active X-related market prices the Iran x Israel/US conflict ending by December 31, 2026, at 100% probability, reflecting strong trader consensus amid $11.9K liquidity and 116 traders, potentially signaling resolution expectations or low-volume lock-in.[2]
